headlines.text: Iran reviewing US 14-point war-ending proposal; Trump says deal is 'very possible'
S&P 500, Nasdaq, Dow all closed at record highs Wednesday on Iran peace hopes
Oil tumbles over 3% as US-Iran deal talk heats up, Strait of Hormuz may reopen
Israel strikes Beirut for first time since Lebanon ceasefire, targets Hezbollah commander
Secretary of State Rubio meets Pope Leo XIV at Vatican amid Trump-Pope tensions over Iran war
Republicans redrawing congressional maps in 5+ states ahead of tough November midterms
Trump signs new counterterrorism strategy naming drug cartel elimination the top US priority
Gas prices hit $4.54/gal national average — up over $1 since war began in February
Met Gala 2026 'Fashion Is Art' memes flood the internet — Bad Bunny aged 50 years overnight
Devil Wears Prada 2 opens strong as Meryl Streep and Anne Hathaway reunite after 20 years

stories.hed: Iran Reads the Fine Print on America's 14-Point Peace Proposal
stories.dek: Tehran is officially reviewing a US memorandum of understanding that would ease its grip on the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for a gradual lifting of the naval blockade — a deal Iran's own officials simultaneously called 'a list of American wishes.' Trump, who previously declared the war 'won,' is now saying there's 'never a deadline,' which is either very zen or very alarming.

stories.hed: Israel Bombs Beirut Again, Breaking Its Own Ceasefire With Lebanon
stories.dek: Israel struck the southern suburbs of Beirut for the first time since agreeing to a ceasefire last month, targeting a Hezbollah Radwan force commander. Netanyahu confirmed the strike in a joint statement with the Defense Minister, while Lebanese-Israeli peace talks are still tentatively scheduled for next week in Washington.

stories.hed: GOP Redraws Maps in 5 States, Targeting 13 Democratic House Seats Before Midterms
stories.dek: Republicans are exploiting a recent Supreme Court ruling to redraw congressional maps in Tennessee, Alabama, Louisiana, South Carolina and beyond, gunning for up to 13 seats held by Democrats. Special elections since 2024 suggest a Democratic wave may be building anyway, which means both parties are essentially playing 3D chess on a board that keeps moving.

stories.hed: Trump Signs Counterterrorism Strategy Making Drug Cartel Elimination America's Top Priority
stories.dek: President Trump officially made wiping out drug cartels across the Western Hemisphere the highest-priority counterterrorism mission for the US government. This lands the same week DEA agents and the National Guard staged a show of force at MacArthur Park in Los Angeles, a densely populated immigrant neighborhood west of downtown.

stories.hed: Microsoft May Quietly Abandon Its 2030 Clean Energy Pledge Because AI Is Too Hungry
stories.dek: Bloomberg reports Microsoft is considering walking back its landmark goal of matching 100% of electricity use with renewable energy by 2030 — because AI data centers are eating so much power that the math no longer works. The company set those goals before the AI boom, which is a polite way of saying they promised something before they knew what they were promising.

markets.context: Markets extended record highs as US-Iran peace deal hopes hammered oil prices and kept AI stocks roaring, with the S&P and Nasdaq both notching fresh all-time closes Wednesday.

gas.note: Up $1.28 from a year ago — so next time someone complains about the price of a latte, just point at the gas pump.

popCulture.hed: Met Gala 2026 'Fashion Is Art' Carpet Breaks the Internet — Bad Bunny Arrives as a 70-Year-Old Man
popCulture.dek: The first Monday in May delivered chaos as usual: Bad Bunny used prosthetics to age himself five decades, Katy Perry hid behind a fencing mask before dramatically revealing her face in a GIF that became the week's dominant meme format, and Sam Smith arrived in a 52-pound outfit designed by their partner. Beyonce co-chaired in a skeleton-inspired gown while Jeff Bezos co-sponsored the whole thing, which the protesters outside had opinions about.

genZ.definition: At the Met Gala on May 4, Katy Perry wore a custom Stella McCartney gown with a fencing mask headpiece by Miodrag Guberinic — the moment she flipped it open to reveal her face became an instantly viral GIF used online to signal 'goodbye,' 'time to sleep,' or 'dropping the facade.' It spread across X, Instagram, and TikTok within hours of the red carpet and is still generating new meme formats three days later.
genZ.usage: Iran reading the 14-point US peace proposal and calling it 'a list of American wishes': *Katy Perry mask reveal GIF*

tldr: The US and Iran are edging toward a deal to end their 69-day war, with Tehran reviewing a 14-point American proposal while oil prices tumbled and Wall Street hit fresh record highs. Meanwhile, back on earth, the Met Gala happened and Katy Perry's face is now a meme.
